steps: Go to https://console.anthropic.com/ and sign in (or create an account with email, Google, or SSO)
Complete account setup and add a payment method (pay-as-you-go billing required for API access)
In the left sidebar, click 'API Keys'
Give your key a descriptive name (e.g. 'my-app-production')
Click 'Create Key' and copy the full key immediately — it starts with 'sk-ant-' and will never be shown again

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Anthropic API key. Sent in the x-api-key request header.

notes: API key is shown only once at creation — save it immediately in a secure location
Billing is pay-as-you-go; set usage limits in the console to avoid unexpected charges
New accounts may receive free credits for testing
Rate limits depend on your usage tier; see https://docs.anthropic.com/en/api/rate-limits
The required request header is 'x-api-key', not 'Authorization'

test_endpoint.description: List all available Claude models to verify the API key is valid
